Your reserve is running a touch thin today and you've already burned through a solid day's worth of effort — tonight's for refilling.

Should you work out?
Done well — moderate effort matched a lighter-reserve day; no need to chase more.

Should you eat?
Yes — ~50g protein and real food before bed; you're sitting too deep in the hole today.

Should you rest?
Bank it — thin reserve tonight, so protect sleep and skip anything that costs you.

Performance: Done well — moderate effort matched a lighter-reserve day; no need to chase more.
